_comment: Black-market verbs over StrategyState.Get().BlackMarket (Il2CppMenace.Strategy.BlackMarket). The bespoke Refresh verb lives in Strategy/Market.cs; these are the trivial reads and mutations.

verbs.name: CountItemInstances
verbs.summary: How many instances of the given template, stack type and remaining timeout the market holds.

verbs.name: Restock
verbs.summary: Restock the black market to its configured stock, optionally decrementing remaining timeouts and resetting the restock counter.

verbs.name: FillBlueprintVouchers
verbs.summary: Top up the market's blueprint vouchers and tokens. Returns false when none were added.

verbs.name: AddItem
verbs.summary: Add an existing item instance to the black market with an optional remaining timeout.

verbs.name: RemoveItem
verbs.summary: Remove an item instance from the black market. Returns false when it is not present.
